<!--
  Thanks for contributing to Hex Viewer! 🎉
  Please fill out the sections below so we can review your PR quickly.
-->

## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what this PR does and why. -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Link any related issues, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] 🌐 Translation / new locale
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (format, lint, coverage, build).
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation where appropriate.
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` (under the current date section).

## Screenshots (if UI changes)
